items.title: TRAVEL ABROAD
items.subtitle: GOAL
items.content:
Travelling abroad seems like a natural outcome from travelling your own country. Here's the countries I'd like to visit and why:

  • UK: to visit Tower of London and it's ravens
  • USA: to meet my favorite content creators
  • Finland: to attend WRC rally
  • Germany: to experience Nürburgring Nordschleife atleast as a passenger
  • Japan: to feel alien

These reasons may not seem grand, but that's what makes my approach: these are only to get me there. I don't have any other plans or expectations, and having no plan is exactly what I like in travelling.
